headline: Half of Americans Think $1,000 Is Needed to Start Investing, They’re Wrong
summary: A perception gap is keeping millions of Americans on the sidelines of the stock market. This is especially true if you look at Charles Schwab’s 2025 Modern Wealth Survey, which found that roughly half of non-investors say they do not have enough money to invest, even as brokerage minimums have collapsed and fractional shares let ... headline: Altria (NYSE:MO) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
summary: Tobacco company Altria (NYSE:MO) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 20.1% year on year to $5.43 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.32 per share was 5.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
